name_en: 👄FENDI New iconic Baguette medium handbag, Cuoio Romano leather material with handcrafted decorative stitching. Adorned with FF clasp. Features front flap, magnetic snap, internal pocket with zip pocket, leather Selleria stamp, and vintage gold-finish metal hardware. The bag comes with a removable handle and shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Model: FD8600, Dimensions: 27*6*15cm
